rationale: Title X better matches Europace survey-title conventions: topic in patients with atrial fibrillation, followed by an EHRA survey descriptor. It is cleaner and more idiomatic than Title Y, while still conveying the study population and practice-survey focus.
loser_weakness: Title Y has awkward and redundant wording, especially “European EHRA physician survey.” “Diagnostic and therapeutic management” is informative, but the overall structure is less polished and less journal-like.
